prompt:
Use case: closing CTA
Primary request: Land the ad with one clean invitation for qualified leads. Luxury-minimal brutalist end card, no people, no logos, one CTA only.
Scene/background: nearly empty black field with one off-white brutalist plane and a single burnt orange button-like bar
Subject: clear CTA for serious buyers
Action: beat 1 (0-2s) the scene settles into stillness; beat 2 (2-4s) CTA text appears with a gentle push-in and a final burnt orange glow
Camera: slow, centered push-in
Lighting/mood: calm, decisive, premium
Color palette: black, off-white, burnt orange
Style/format: luxury-minimal end card
Audio: pulse resolves, one final low note
Text (verbatim): "START A CONVERSATION"
Constraints: one CTA only; no website URL required; no logos; no people
Avoid: clutter, extra subheads, flashy end-card animation
